title: Improved Applied Energistics 2
description: Textures of item, blocks and gui in 32x32 extension for Applied Energistics 2
body: This resource pack improves the textures of the great AE 2 mod, mostly keeping to the original style, as you can see in the screenshots, but many of the blocks got a new texture, darker, and in a different style, but I think it's beautiful. In general, you can check out how it looks in the screenshots, and in the game.
